info.english_meaning: to enact to dance to act to show
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ayaM DAtuH na RopadeSaH  ' RopadeSAstu anardanAw ....' iti paryudAsAt  ataH ' upasargAt samAsepi ...' (8.4.14) iti sopasarge RatvaM na  avaspandanaM nAwyam  ' avasyandane ' ityeke
